headline: How Is PG&E Corporation's Stock Performance Compared to Other Utility Stocks?
summary: As PG&E Corporation has outperformed its industry peers recently, analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: PG&E, Algonquin Power and Avista Are Drawing New Analyst Interest in the Utility Sector
summary: Wall Street is turning constructive on the utility sector, and three names are drawing the clearest signals right now. UBS upgraded PG&E to Buy, Raymond James upgraded Algonquin Power to Outperform, and Barclays initiated Avista with a neutral stance, each call reflecting a distinct thesis on risk, recovery, and valuation. PG&E: UBS Sees Meaningful Re-Rating ... PG&E, Algonquin Power and Avista Are Drawing New Analyst Interest in the Utility Sector

headline: UBS Upgrades PG&E to Buy, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: UBS  analyst Gregg Orrill   upgrades PG&E (NYSE:PCG) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $20 to $23.
